seoTitle: Taunton vs Taylors Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Taunton and Taylors Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Taunton vs Taylors Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Taunton and Taylors Beach.
heading: Taunton vs Taylors Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Taunton, Queensland and Taylors Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Taylors Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Taunton (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Taunton or Taylors Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Taunton has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Taylors Beach scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Taunton scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Taylors Beach scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Taunton or Taylors Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Taylors Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
